Home › Brevard County › Lowest Health Scores

Restaurants With the Lowest Health Scores in Brevard County

The following 21 restaurants in Brevard County received a health grade of D or F at their most recent inspection, according to Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) public inspection records. Each listing shows its grade, score, and violation counts, ordered from the lowest score.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • D F 21
    DOGS 'R' US

    American 4.3★ (2726)

    Titusville · Brevard County

    Organic

    Violations: 7 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 11 basic

  • S F 29
    STEVES FAMILY DINER

    Other 4.4★ (2486)

    Titusville · Brevard County

    OrganicHealthy

    Violations: 5 high-priority, 5 intermediate, 16 basic

  • L F 35
    LOYD HAVE MERCY

    American 4.6★ (2366)

    Titusville · Brevard County

    VeganVeg

    Violations: 7 high-priority, 9 basic

    SOUTHERN SISTERS CAFE

    American 4.5★ (1301)

    Melbourne · Brevard County

    KetoPaleoHealthy

    Violations: 5 high-priority, 6 intermediate, 4 basic
